candidates.title: Candidate-Chain Consistency Guard
candidates.description: Deterministic local read-only checker that validates release-metadata, candidate-chain JSON, and candidate-chain Markdown consistency. Includes candidate-chain-specific forbidden-claim scanning, dev/CI integration, and fixture-based tests. No runtime changes.
notes: Accepted into the v0.6.20 candidate chain on 2026-07-01.
Does not enable live trading, live submit, order placement, broker/provider execution, credential loading, network access, or approval queue mutation.
Does not change RiskManager, kill-switch, deadman, heartbeat, or audit hash-chain behavior.
